scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run dev:server & npm run dev:web & wait'
scripts.test: npm run test -w @boroda/server && npm run test -w @boroda/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @boroda/web && npm run build -w @boroda/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @boroda/web && npm run typecheck -w @boroda/server
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test
